positive: A symmetrical, minimalist illustration of a majestic soaring eagle and a stylized mountain range at dawn. The style is highly detailed linework combined with bold color blocking, reminiscent of modern nature posters and tattoo art. The eagle is depicted in mid-flight with powerful, sharp wings, forming a dynamic, clean silhouette against a gradient sky of deep indigo and soft coral hues. The mountain range below is stylized with sharp, geometric peaks, conveying grandeur and permanence. The overall composition is centralized, emphasizing vertical flow and strong contrast between the dark silhouettes and the vibrant background. Focus on clean, vector-like edges, perfect for screen printing or direct-to-garment (DTG) textile printing. --ar 1:1 --v 5.1
negative: blurry, deformed, messy, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, copyright, cartoon, realism, photorealism
